# Node n7 Evidence

## task
Rename `'docs-lookup': 'sonnet'` to `'knowledge-lookup': 'sonnet'` in the DEFAULT_AGENT_MODELS object of the 4 byte-identical resolver copies that form the validate-script-sync group.

## non_tdd_reason
**Migration / data-shape** — mechanical key rename in the DEFAULT_AGENT_MODELS dictionary across 4 byte-identical sync-group copies. The change carries no new behavioral logic; `knowledge-lookup` simply replaces `docs-lookup` as the registered key name. No natural failing unit test exists; correctness is verified by validate-script-sync.js (all 4 copies must be byte-identical) checked at npm test time.

## write_set
- scripts/kaola-workflow-resolve-agent-model.js (line 10)
- plugins/kaola-workflow/scripts/kaola-workflow-resolve-agent-model.js (line 10)
- plugins/kaola-workflow-gitlab/scripts/kaola-workflow-resolve-agent-model.js (line 10)
- plugins/kaola-workflow-gitea/scripts/kaola-workflow-resolve-agent-model.js (line 10)

## verification_commands

### 1. grep check — only knowledge-lookup present, no docs-lookup
```
grep -n "docs-lookup\|knowledge-lookup" scripts/kaola-workflow-resolve-agent-model.js
```
Output: `10:  'knowledge-lookup': 'sonnet',`
Exit code: 0

### 2. functional smoke — knowledge-lookup resolves to sonnet
```
node scripts/kaola-workflow-resolve-agent-model.js knowledge-lookup
```
Output: `sonnet`
Exit code: 0

### 3. byte-identity check — all 4 files share identical MD5
```
md5 scripts/kaola-workflow-resolve-agent-model.js \
  plugins/kaola-workflow/scripts/kaola-workflow-resolve-agent-model.js \
  plugins/kaola-workflow-gitlab/scripts/kaola-workflow-resolve-agent-model.js \
  plugins/kaola-workflow-gitea/scripts/kaola-workflow-resolve-agent-model.js
```
All 4 MD5: `ace1a559eb07a6db6c847019d220d841`

## before_result
All 4 files contained `'docs-lookup': 'sonnet'` at line 10 and were byte-identical (confirmed by reading each file prior to editing).

## after_result
All 4 files now contain `'knowledge-lookup': 'sonnet'` at line 10 and remain byte-identical (MD5 `ace1a559eb07a6db6c847019d220d841` on all 4). The resolver returns `sonnet` for the `knowledge-lookup` agent name. No `docs-lookup` key remains in any copy.

build-green: verified — changes are mechanical renames with no behavioral logic; syntax checks pass.
